They will FIGHT for you!
#winning

I can’t say enough good things about Elisabeth. She handled my a personal injury case and achieved a very positive outcome.

If you’re in need of a personal injury attorney, you’re probably already dealing with a difficult, unwanted situation and a lot of emotions. I expected that navigating a personal injury claim would only add more stress and uncertainty, but with Elisabeth in charge, the entire process was surprisingly easy for me. Every conversation with her left me feeling better, more confident, and reassured that everything was under control.

From start to finish, she made what could have been an overwhelming experience feel simple and manageable. It was immediately clear that she has deep experience dealing with insurance companies — she knew exactly how to handle them, what to push for, and when to stand firm.

What truly sets Elisabeth apart is how personal and supportive she is. I never felt like just another case. She genuinely cared about me and my situation, and it showed in every interaction. She was always available to answer questions, explain things clearly, and give honest advice.

She also kept me fully informed the entire way, reaching out promptly with updates so I always knew where things stood. That level of communication and reliability is rare and incredibly valuable.

If you’re looking for a personal injury attorney who is highly skilled, responsive, and truly on your side, I would absolutely recommend Elisabeth.
Exceptional experience! I felt heard and represented. They got the max reward for my settlement and stayed in constant contact with me. Highly recommend!

I cannot recommend Alder Giersch highly enough! From the very first consultation, they demonstrated an impressive level of professionalism, knowledge, and dedication to my case. They took the time to explain every detail, kept me informed throughout the process, and fought tirelessly to ensure the best possible outcome.

Their expertise and strategic approach made all the difference, and their compassion and support reassured me every step of the way. If you’re looking for a top-tier attorney who truly cares about their clients and delivers outstanding results, look no further than Alder Giersch.

I've hired attorneys from Adler Giersch twice over the span of a half dozen years to handle accident cases (MVA) that weren't my fault. I returned the second time after they had handled my first case successfully.

The attorney I used the first time had changed firms, so Steven Anglés handled my case this time. This time my claim was a bit more complicated as two different defendants & insurance companies were implicated in responsibility. Once Steve had been hired and took on the case it alleviated the unrelenting pressure I had been under from both of the defendant's attorneys.

Each member of Steve's team, Heather (case manager whom I had worked with before), Elisabeth (attorney), & Sabrina (Litigation paralegal), were always immediately responsive to the myriad of questions that I had during a fairly long process of settling this claim, since neither of the two defendant's were admitting responsibility for being at fault.

As this case wound down, & blame assigned to one party my a mediator, that attorney tried to make a low ball offer & threatened to go to court over the claim after the mediator had already awarded a claim amount. In collaboration with Steve, and his recommendations, I did not accept that, and within a span of a couple of days they accepted the judgement.

So, in summary, I would without reservation recommend Steve & his team for their care, responsiveness, and most importantly their skill & insight in handling my case. A special thanks to Heather who was awesome in both cases! ;-)
Great people and very nice was a good experience

I was in a rearend auto accident April of 2018. I tried dealing with their insurance company on my own but quickly realized they were not dealing with me honestly. Jacob Gent, and Adler Giersch came highly recommended by a medical professional treating my injury. This was the worst time to be dealing with courts, insurance companies and their attorney’s. The case drug out for 5 years because of pandemic closures and everything going to Zoom meetings. Jacob was very responsive when I had concerns. My case was finally settled just before trial. Jacob was able to get the expert witnesses cost greatly reduced. Arthur Leritz, Jacob Gent,  Attorney & Paralegal Jenny Lacobucci were very helpful, informative, & cared about my case. I cannot thank them enough for all their help. I highly recommend them & their firm Adler Giersch. Job with a tough case Jacob Gent

I was referred to Adler Giersch Law Firm by my church pastor. I had a fatal hit and run car accident in June 2021. I was able to get legal guidance and instructions. Mr. Jacob Gent-the personal injury attorney was helping along side while I was getting medical treatments and vehicle repairment. He offered his legal guidance and advices with consistent scheduled phone call conferences. I was able to get my claim settlement in about a year and a half. I was being very thankful of the legal assistance of which I had received from Mr. Jacob Gent-the personal injury attorney and he was kind, helpful, supportive and professional. I'd recommend Adler Giersch Law Firm and Mr. Jacob Gent-the personal attorney to you.

As rough and difficult times can be when dealing with a legal case. Here at Alder Giersch they take this stress and worry away. Jacob Gent is an excellent lawyer as well as Jenny Iacobucci who works along side him. He listens and pays attention to detail. Depending on what you're going through this team will make sure you are taken care of. I always felt supported and it was wonderful working with them. Specially when times got tough. If you need a lawyer this is the perfect place to go.

Jacob and Jenny were great throughout handling my case and getting results. It took longer than expected but not the worst from what I’ve heard of others experiencing. I’m happy to say I went with Adler Giersch. I recommend them and have no problem using their services again if the need arises. The worst parts were out of their control with the pandemic and insurance adjuster vacations.
I had the opportunity of being represented by a great legal team,  I was included in every aspect. Jacob was very open and clear on how he would move forward on the case. Thanks Jacob & team

Two years ago I was hit from behind by another driver.  I have had constant Dr. and Specialist appointments in the last two years because of injuries to the neck and shoulder and a loss of previous back mobility.  Jacob and Jenny and the  team at Adler Giersch (Everett Office) have been my constant go to people during these two years.  They are all very professional and very pleasant to work with. I would recommend them to anyone who finds themselves in a similar situation.

I was recommended to Jacob Gent with Alder & Giersch by a friend and I am so grateful for his recommendation.  Jacob Gent & Jenny Iacobucci , have been the back bone to my 5 yearlong case and my emotional support system. Their professional and compassionate way of working kept me aggressively fighting. Their reassurance, and belief in me and constant reminders of I deserve the quality of life after being knocked down and put through the most ugly situations by Insurance companies and doctors, they continued to fight and never gave up on me. They fought for me, they fought long and hard for me and I cannot be more thankful and appreciative. They were very thorough, explained things and kept me involved and never left me wondering “Are they doing anything with my case”  They cared for more than just the end settlement, and for that I am thankful.  We WON, but even if we did not come out on top, I would be thankful for these 2. They are incredible people, and true professional’s. I highly recommend Jacob, to anyone that is needing a Personal Injury Lawyer.

I was in a car accident 6 years ago, and due to the nature of the insurance process, I am just now completing my settlement.  I cannot say enough about the professionalism and care with which Jacob, Lauren and Maria handled my case.  I felt as if they cared about my health enough to make sure I got the best care available.  There were many times I felt "done" with the on-going treatments because I didn't seem to be finding any relief from my injuries, but they kept encouraging me to move forward and to ask my doctors what I could do next.  I am thrilled to say that while I will probably have life-long injury issues from the accident, I am able to be so much more active than if I had not been urged to and then pursued the necessary treatments.

Our son was ran over by a car and severely injured. After being transported to Harborview, having surgery and spending multiple days in the ICU, we were concerned about whether all the bills would be covered. We contacted Adler Giersch and worked Jacob Gent and Jenny Iacobucci. They answered all our questions, and took the time to explain everything to us. They always treated our son with compassion and made sure he felt comfortable every step of the way. Their knowledge of the Insurance laws was so valuable and their dedication to a positive resolution of our son's case was amazing. We always felt Jacob and Jenny had our son's best interest at heart, I couldn't give a high enough recommendation for that.

Very professional, ethical, Attorney Jacob Gent and his Assistant Jenny proviided excellent results, timely communication and top shelf legal services after my auto accident and subsequent surgery and PT treatment. I cannot say enough and highly recommend their practice.

After an MVA left me broken in many ways, the worst of which was a head injury,  a friend recommended Adler-Giersch and Richard Adler’s book on brain injury.  Thankfully, I ended up with him as my attorney and I could not have been happier!  He knows so much about brain injury and is an advocate, not only for his clients, but for all brain injury victims.  I was so impressed with the professionalism, care, and compassion I was met with from the very beginning.

Richard Adler and Jacob Gent fought hard for the settlement I deserved, which allowed me to recover without stress and worry.  I learned from having a different attorney just prior to Adler-Giersch, that not all firms are equipped to manage cases like this.  Mr. Adler has created a firm that has the resources to do it all, so I didn’t have to!  SO THANKFUL for that!

In the end, I was awarded a settlement and they still continued to work for me after the settlement as they worked out agreements with the medical insurance companies.   When searching for a PI attorney, especially when it comes to brain injury, there is no attorney more knowledgeable than the ones at this firm.  In addition, they back that knowledge up with volunteer work in the community and with the Brain Injury Alliance of Washington.  I am proud to have had them as my legal team...and they have inspired me to help others in my position, as well.  Thank you to Richard, Jacob, and Jenny for your sharp skills and kindness.  I felt like a cherished family member from the get-go.

I cannot say enough about this amazing firm.
In 2016 I was in an auto accident.  Adler- Giersch was highly recommended by a friend, & I was extremely impressed by their kindness, professionalism, knowledge, communication,
and how comfortable I felt the first time meeting Jacob Gent, Attorney & Jenny Iacobucci, Paralegal.

I highly recommend them & their firm!

Susan M.

Jacob W Gent and his assistant Jenny Iacobucci were amazing! They took our case knowing that there was not going to be much funds to gain from! Yet, they treated our case like it was a million dollar case. They did an outstanding job in all the aspects of the our case. They treated us with kindness, respect and made us feel like family.

Thanks to Adler Giersch my family did not have to navigate the confusing process of our uninsured motorist policy. They were able to get the Insurance company to pay much more than they were willing to. My family got enough money to pay our very large medical bills and some compensation for our losses. Without Jacob Gent we would have be in debt with no way to pay all the bills.  We are truly grateful and highly recommended these guys

I hired Jacob Gent to represent me in two car accident claims.... 1 in 2015 and 1 in 2016. I sustained injuries in both 1 as a driver and one as a passenger. Jacob gent supported me in keeping both of the claims separate and his paralegal Jenny was very supportive in contacting all the medical offices that I had been to to try to recover from my injuries. They also represented me to the other car insurance offices so all I had to do was get well. That was the real relief to me and I recommend Jacob Gent to anyone that desires a thorough, determined attorney.

In July of 2016 my wife and I were in a two car auto accident caused by the other driver. We both had medical treatments for neck and back pain. In a few months my wife healed up and was back to herself. I on the other hand had severe low back pain. At the time of the accident I was already dealing with low back pain due to a degenerative spinal condition. The accident caused new injury to my low back and a nightmare for my family.
We were referred to Jacob Gent by the Chiropractor the my wife had been seeing. We had so much anxiety because I lost my ability to work at the business that I was partnered in with my son. I was forced to retire from work. Jacob Gent was hired soon after the accident as we were overwhelmed by all of the things we had to deal with. Right from the start he eased our anxiety and helped us each step of the way.
In December of 2017 I had low back surgery which helped to relieve some of my symptoms. Even though I still suffer with low back pain, Jacob Gent was able to negotiate a settlement that is allowing me to continue seeking treatment.
We would have been totally lost had it not been for Jacob's timely direction. He took the burden from us and was effective in representing my circumstance.
I can truly recommend Jacob Gent and his team as a trustworthy source of legal counsel.

Jacob & Jenny:  Thorough, Fair, and Highly Experienced

Our experience with Jacob and Jenny, his paralegal, was outstanding from the start. My wife and I researched lawyers for a few days until we found Jacob using an online search . We read reviews for many lawyers. Jacob’s reviews are great and it seemed that Jacob fit what we were looking for.
The accident I was in was fairly minor, yet the at-fault driver was underinsured. I wanted to insure that my injuries and the damage to my vehicle were taken care of. My injuries took a lot of time to heal and the process can be daunting. Jacob and Jenny eased the hassle by communicating and educating us on the process.
Jacob was able to navigate the insurance claim world like a champ. Jenny was very thorough and tenacious with gathering paperwork and keeping everything organized and documented. Both she and Jacob communicated with me and my wife so well that they answered most questions before I asked them. Jacob's experience with insurance claims and how the system works is quite extensive and the results were spectacular. Jacob set clear expectations from the start and explained the process very well. I felt at ease the entire time which provided confidence and hope. Jacob treated my family with the highest respect and I feel very good about the outcome of my case

Hello,  if you are reading this it is because a tragedy has befallen you or somebody you know and you are looking for help.
This is my experience with Jacob Gent, and Jenny Lacobucci of the law offices of Adler Giersch.

In the year of 2016 i was in a car accident. I was on my way into work when my entire world changed. I was rear ended by a truck going 60 mph.  Because of this i suffered a TBI ( traumatic brain injury )  It was a very confusing time for me and i needed a lot of help.

From the moment Jacob signed on with me after the wreck he and Jenny made sure that i felt safe and taken care of, Answering any and all of my questions no matter how many of them or how many times i would ask.

Jenny Lacobucci is Jacob Gents paralegal. As to be expected When dealing with an injury like mine the process can take time. Jenny Helped me to find peace of mind in the fact that any time i had a question regarding my case or doctor related questions she always had an answer for me, or would confer with Jacob to get me my answer swiftly. They provided me with the names of doctors and hospitals that were best equipped to help me with my injury.

When Jacob sign up to help me He gave me all the information and tools i would need to help myself. While his main concern was taking care of my case and all that goes along with that, he also made sure to take care of me as a human being making sure i was able to understand everything he was saying and helping me to understand my injury.

I could go on and on with all the information i have about my experience with with Adler Giersch,  but my suggestion to you is pick up the phone give them a call and experience a whole new world of help and options in your time of need.

After enduring months of challenges with my own insurance company and with one of my care providers uncertain of whether or not the insurance companies would come through with full payment, I chose to listen to the advice of that care provider and contact Adler Giersch to see if they could help me with my car accident claim. Initially, Jacob spoke to me on three different occasions, as well as invested time to investigate whether or not I was in need of counsel, free of charge. Even with a busy schedule and a tight timeline ahead of them, Jacob and Heather truly believed that I had a viable case and they were willing to commit to helping me with my situation. Adler Giersch was able to navigate through all of the confusing details of my case and explain things in very clear terms. Both Jacob and Heather helped me feel confident making my decisions based on their expert recommendations – their dedication to my case helped me feel like I was truly understood and represented. Adler Giersch has been an amazing ally in helping me with my settlement.

A great law firm is hard to find. As a lawyer myself, I know what I’m looking for and it’s still not easy to find that perfect combination of intellect, skill, experience, commitment, and compassion in lawyers with whom you can communicate effectively and in whom you can fully place your trust.  Richard Adler and Jacob Gent are two such lawyers, and their firm, Adler Giersch, has earned its reputation as the premier personal injury practice in the Pacific Northwest.

But practicing law is more than just about handling a “case,” and what makes Adler Giersch extraordinary is the way they worked with me and my wife following her injury in an automobile accident. I wasn’t looking for legal representation at that point. I approached Richard initially in search of just a medical referral because my wife had experienced a mild traumatic brain injury (mTBI). Adler Giersch has extensive experience representing clients with such injuries, and I knew that Richard must have consulted with brain specialists in the course of his practice. I hoped he could refer my wife to someone with special expertise in mTBI—someone local.

Richard wasn’t bothered in the least by my request. His only concern was that my wife receive the best care available (and he gladly provided that all-important referral). The issue of legal representation was something to be left for future consideration, and there was never any pressure. We simply kept in touch with the firm as my wife visited various specialists for treatment and therapy, and when the final extent of her injuries and disabilities was known, we met to discuss the legal options. That was when we finally made the decision to retain Adler Giersch. We couldn’t have made a better choice.

My wife’s case did not involve a large claim, and there were complicating factors that made it a difficult case to take to trial. These factors were fully explored and explained to us, and the decision to achieve a settlement was a shared one. Jacob was extremely effective in negotiating that settlement, which actually exceeded my wife’s expectations--it was an excellent outcome from every standpoint.

While not every case leads to a satisfactory conclusion, when you deal with a great firm and great lawyers (and great human beings), the experience itself produces its own form of satisfaction. That was certainly true here; the experience of working with Richard and Jacob was exceptional. Their firm does exceptional work.
Don’t hesitate to consult them if you’ve been injured and are considering your legal options. You won’t find more qualified or caring people to represent you.

My daughter sustained a concussion when she was hit by car while crossing the street on a crosswalk.  We didn't know what to do. I began researching law firms and found that the Adler Giersch law firm was an expert in the area of concussion and had top ratings.They have 4 locations and their Everett office was convenient to us. Attorney Jacob Gent and paralegal Jenny are excellent! They immediately started working on our case. They listened to us, investigated all aspects of the collision and gave advice about how to proceed. They are knowledgeable, experienced and confident. We never doubted their ability to do their best for us. We highly recommend this law firm to anyone in need of a personal injury attorney!
Post Review	Read our review guidelines

Jacob Gent and his team are amazing. You definitely want them in your corner when working to settle your injury case. Jacob is very honest and his knowledge of how the insurance companies work, since he use to work for them, helps make him a more effective injury lawyer. Jacob has great follow through always explaining the next steps and he never acts too busy to answer your questions. He uses resources like private detectives to investigate the insurance policy limits of the at-fault party and physical capacity testing by doctors to ensure that your limitations due to injury are checked and documented correctly.
This is not my first time having to use a personal injury lawyer and having Jacob on my side this time made for an extremely better outcome then I had with the other lawyer. In 2014 I sustained a broken arm and shattered wrist from the air bag deploying when another driver entered into my lane. My car had a broken frame and the insurance company told me they were going to repair the frame and give the car back to me. I did not think it would be safe to drive a car with a broken frame, i thought it should be totaled at that point. This is when I hired Jacob, he agreed with me and went right to work not backing down until the insurance company totaled my car and paid me for it. Jacob stuck with me for three years during my recovery and rehab. We just settled my case and Jacob was able to negotiate the max dollar amount that the at-fault insurance company policy allowed for. I am very grateful for his unwavering commitment to me and my case.  I would highly recommend him and his team to anyone needing a personal injury lawyer.
Very experienced and knows what he is talking about. Very good communication and is always on top of things.  I highly recommend using Jacob and Adler Giersch for any type of auto accident.

I was referred to Jacob by my doctor when I was involved in a car accident. Initially, Jacob tried to offer advice and assist me in representing myself against the defending party. For several months we spoke many times, free of charge, but it got to the point that it was obvious I would need professional services. It was a an obvious choice to stick with Jacob as my representation. He and his staff are top notch, diligent, thorough, and detail oriented. It was refreshing that Jacob would always keep me up to date on my case from beginning to end and he would take the time to explain the nuances of the case or answer any questions I may have had. I wold recommend Jacob and his staff wholeheartedly without any reservations.

In 2015 my family had the pleasure of meeting attorney Lauren Adler, a personal injury lawyer.
In December 2014 our sister was ran over by a truck (she was pinned under it when it stopped) in the parking lot of her employer. We were referred to Adler Law offices by an extended family member that had only great things to say.
In the long year ahead Lauren Adler was indispensable to our sister and her worried parents. Lauren was dealing with multiple insurance companies including LNI, always putting our sister first. Lauren’s knowledge and infinite patience with all of us made this horrific accident easier to handle, allowing us to focus on our sisters recovery.
I can say without doubt you will never meet someone of Lauren Adler caliber in a law office.
Words cannot describe how thankful we are to Lauren Adler and the Adler Law Offices.

I call the office of Diego Gavilanes and his secretary was kind and professional.  I scheduled an appointment via Zoom; Diego took time to make sure he was not missing any details about my case. Then, we agreed on a second meeting for further investigate the  possibilities regarding my case. Diego called me the day of the appointment and told me that unfortunately,  my case had not any positive pathway to move forward. He was so honest and clear,  that even though those were bad news for me, I was okay because his professional and kind maner made me trust his knowledge regarding my case. Finding honest lawyers is difficult,  trust Diego with your case, and be patient. Immigration law is super complicated, but having the assurance that the lawyer you're working with is honest and reliable is a must have. Thank you so much Diego and Jodin for all the good work you do. God bless you!
We are pleased with Diego so far, he and his staff are kind, professional and helpful.
Really bad experience

Masks ....... Rediculous.. Other than that I'm a pro and shopping regularly for 10 years now I get no discounts for the business I bring in there. They do have pro offers if you use your LAR account. Which I don't operate my business on credit and won't so I basically feel screwed. At least they give  a military discount which I don't get either ppffftt!
Worst experience ever with this guy !! He is not very professional !!

He was the first attorney that was willing to help me thru the immigration process with my husband. And was there every step of the way to the very end. I'm blessed because of this man everything went thru smoothly and I was young and nieve with my unstable mental health issues and a baby on the way, not having my husband would of been devastating and it was crucial for him to be legalized in those days I was only 19 and had no clue what to do in my case. Thanks to this dedicated attorney it's been 20 yrs. Since then and he's still as honorable and dedicated to helping people thru the laws of immigration. Thank u Mrs. Diego Gavilanes. Keep doing what you love to do and that is making the immigrants legal and doing it with the law in your side.
Best personal injury and Immigration attorney in the area and the staff is kind and pleasant. Diego and his team are highly experienced and truly care about their clients.
Best law office! Every one is very helpful, they answer promptly and detailed.
Expensive but they will help with your legal issues
Best lawyer you can get :)

I am very please with the outcome of my case. He and his team member Maribel were both professional and had a lot of compassion for my situation. I appreciate their hard work. I think the most important attribute s that they listened to me and what I wanted. Thank You!

Diego helped me to get my green card and I couldn't have been more happy with his support. He always explained everything carefully and was always prepared with an answer whenever we had questions. He made us feel at ease throughout the whole process. It was a pleasure working with Diego and I would recommend his services!
I have worked with Diego and his team and they are beyond impressive. There knowledge and professional manner makes me feel like I am in good hands, I recommend them to anyone. Gracias Diego
Great service👍👍👍👍👍

Very bad experience. I don't recommend it.
Beware of Diego Gavilanes! We have had two very bad experiences with him and his office. I reccomend you choose another attorney to represent your case!

Great lawyer. Really happy with all the service he provided to us. He came in on my case far in to it and he worked hard and spent alot of time on my case. I never had any communication problem at all. Always kept me updated on everything. Emails with copies of paperwork and phone calls to keep me updated. We went to trial and he fought and backed me up thru everything. Until the prosecutor gave up. Worth every penny and I would not use or recommend  anyone else.

Thankyou diego for everything.
Excelent Lawyer
Thank you for your help.
Awesome service and helpful.  Thanks

reviews.text:
If I could leave a review with 0 stars, I would. I hired Russell and Hill in 2015 to represent me after my 1st A.L.J. denial. I asked them if they would file a motion. With the appeals review board after explaining my situation. They said that they would, but didn't update my medical information on the motion to appeal. They also had me file a new claim at the same time. I asked them if that would affect my original filing date, which would have been 2010? They blatantly lied to me, telling me that filing a new claim would not affect my claim. THEY LIED TO ME! IT DID! I finally won in May 2021, with the help of a different attorney. But because of the new claim filed as recommended by Russell and Hill, in 2015, not only did I lose 3 more years back pay, but because of 2013 being the backdate that I was given, I CAN'T GET MY EARLY DISABILITY RETIREMENT TEAMSTER PENSION. I HAVE TO WAIT UNTIL I TURN 65 TO RECIEVE MY PENSION AFTER HAVING MY JOB FOR 19 YEARS. ALL BECAUSE OF THE BACKDATE CHANGE, I CANT GET MY RETIREMENT FROM THE TEAMSTERS UNTIL I TURN 65.
They royally screwed me over after lying to me.
reviews.ownerResponse: I will do my best to respond to your false allegations. 1. No claimant is allowed to update medical on an appeal to Federal District Court. 2. Filing a new claim did not affect your original filing date. The Federal District Court appeal was addressing your original filing date. 3. We never lied to you. We still have all our prior communications with you clearly explaining all the circumstances. 4. Your Teamster Pension has absolutely nothing to do with your social security claims. If you would like me to contact your attorney to answer any questions, I would be happy to do that. Thank you.

reviews.text: Carrie is so helpful, she kindly provided guidance to my real estate title related questions, I really appreciate her help!
Kevin is very professional, prompt and provides great communication!  I highly recommend working with him.

I initially retained Gourley Law Group in August 2025 for assistance with my mother’s estate and TEDRA-related issues. At first, I had concerns about delays and communication, especially regarding the lack of a TEDRA petition or enforcement action when the estate was experiencing time-sensitive problems, including foreclosure risk.

However, after raising these issues in my feedback, the firm responded quickly and proactively. They took my concerns seriously, clarified the status of the case, and began taking concrete steps to correct the situation. Communication improved, questions were answered more promptly, and they worked to get the necessary actions moving in the right direction. Their staff showed professionalism in addressing misunderstandings and making sure I felt heard after bringing up my concerns.

While the start of the representation was difficult, I appreciate that they ultimately made an effort to resolve communication issues and work toward protecting my mother’s interests. Their responsiveness after my initial review reflects positively on their commitment to addressing client concerns and improving the overall experience.

I hired Gourley Law Group in June 2025 as a first time homebuyer who had purchased a home where known pest infestations were not disclosed by the sellers via standard disclosure forms. This was the only firm in the greater Seattle area that specialized in this component of real estate law, and who were willing to take my case.

I had the pleasure of working with Kevin, Spencer and Kristen over the course of 4-5 months where they were able to assist me in recovering payment for the damages incurred by the raccoons living in my crawl space and attic. Everyone communicated quickly and efficiently to avoid additional expenses to myself, I felt that I was treated respectfully and in a professional manner, and Spencer was very knowledgeable and skilled in negotiating an acceptable settlement. Overall, I would highly recommend them to anyone seeking Real Estate legal services in the greater Seattle area.

Thanks to Gourley Law Group and the entire team. We contacted Craig Gourley for assistance with a contractor dispute through the online website and Craig responded quickly and, on a weekend no less. We discussed a strategy, cost involved and documentation I would need to send over to support our complaint. We filed through the court to secure our complaint and started by making a claim against the contractor's bond. Several others also filed against the bond which at the time, had limited bond insurance as required by the state at the time. It was a long process establishing who gets the bond money and/or how it would be split between the parties. The Gourley Law Group team was exceptional in negotiating our position and securing us the full amount of the bond. Although not enough to cover our full loss, the cost to proceed further would not be in our best interest since the contractor filed bankruptcy and the cost to pursue this further would require additional cost, we were not willing to spend. Craig offered to reduce our cost of his time so that our expense to recover the bond amount was limited. We found this to be highly acceptable and appreciated. Thank you for your integrity, communication and efforts throughout our case.

Note of caution: I spoke with Mr. Gourley by phone and was assigned to Kevin Burkowsky, made my payment of $500 and did not receive any usable council. I had to point out passages of the legal documents to him which made me question whether he, Kevin, even read those docs. When I asked him for solutions, Kevin told me that someone needs to “do the numbers” but that wouldn’t be him. So what did I pay for? For Kevin to tell me he couldn’t support me. Find a lawyer that will tell you if they can help BEFORE you give them your money. I feel scammed.

We had the pleasure of working with Gourley Law Group for nearly two years on a case, and I cannot recommend their services highly enough. From the beginning, Gwendolyn, Tom, Daina, Craig, and the rest of the staff that was involved, were professional and truly committed to achieving the best possible outcome for us.

We primarily worked with Tom but since our case had some real estate/construction details, he occasionally got Craig's input on things since that is Craig's forte, and we really appreciated that Tom did that! Tom's knowledge, experience, and guidance were invaluable (especially since the case as a whole was uncharted waters for us and therefore stressed us out) and he was very efficient in everything that he did.

Throughout it all, Daina supported us with the paperwork and the never-ending list of details that magically get done without anyone ever needing to ask when and how it was done. So much work was put in to all the documents that were prepared!

I know most people would agree that lawyers are expensive but GLG's billing was straightforward and honest. I never felt cheated or like I wasn't sure what I was paying for.

We had the opportunity to have a couple colloquial conversations with both Tom and Craig and it was fun to get to know them both a bit better on a personal level. The firm even sent us a sweet baby gift (delivered by a very kind personal delivery service) when we welcomed our littlest one during this process. Like I said - very kind, very personal, very understanding!

Just based on my interviews prior to hiring GLG, I think it is difficult to find a law firm that genuinely cares for their clients and truly focuses on the client's best interest, but I think GLG does just that. Highly recommend and we will use them in the future for real estate projects! Thank you, Gourley!!
Found what I needed
Highly recommend this lawyer firm

My name is Lady Lata Patu. I wanted to say how much I appreciate the help and services that GLG has provided for my family & I. Dalynne Singleton is professional and efficient at what she does. We've ran into a lot of issues along the way of closing the estate of my mother, but overall, we have conquered. Mr Gourley was so excited to get to Panama and do work on his yacht that he paid no attention to us as clients. ZERO stars, Mr Gourley. Thank you for absolutely nothing.

reviews.text:
Though I'm not an expert, Mr Waxler and his paralegal struck me as fair, savvy, careful, methodical, and resourceful throughout my contested case. I never felt like I was dealing with hotshots: they kept the temperature low while effectively filing and negotiating to a good resolution.

Nothing makes it easy or stress-free to be party to a family law case, but looking back I can say that the statements I made and the details I provided were all used very well. I have no complaints or regrets.

Mr. Waxler is an incredible lawyer. The reason we initially hired him is because out of the many lawyers we talked to, he seemed to actually believe in what we had to say and that he could help get us through it. This was an extremely complicated, difficult, and unusual case with a very sensitive subject matter. Mr. Waxler was excellent at explaining things to us, and giving us hope even when things didn’t seem to be going in our favor. And in the end we got exactly what we had hoped for. I’m so glad Mr. Waxler believed in us and was willing to take on such a challenging case.

Loren helped us with a complicated family law case and we couldn’t be happier. Both his paralegal and himself were very communicative and answered the many questions we had promptly and with understanding. Highly recommend

I hired Mr. Waxler through my companies MetLife Legal Plan. I reached out to Mr. Waxler and told him I was looking to obtain a Power of Attorney (POA) with the intent of having it signed and notarized during a family visit. This family visit gave him 8 business days to complete the document.

I received an initial draft that contained banking information and account numbers that I did not recognize, and after several conversations where I emphasized the desire for a general power of attorney, I kept received multiple drafts with specific activities that constrained my request for a general POA.

I had a difficult time contacting Mr. Waxler and we routinely missed calls and I found myself more often trying to reach him via e-mail instead (business which Mr. Waxler performs from an @gmail.com account instead of one maintained through his website). In the end, on the last business day my family was available I was able to get in touch with Mr. Waxler. While I waited for my computer to boot up Mr. Waxler casually stated that he would require an additional $100 for the service as it had “taken more time than usual,” at which point I reminded him that this service was covered by my MetLife legal plan coverage.

Facing the disagreement, Mr. Waxler asked if there were any corrections required (there were), but I was taken back by the request for an additional $100 that I declined to move forward with our interactions as I became very wary of what additional charges Mr. Waxler would request. I immediately contacted MetLife Legal Plan providers and notified them of the interaction.

I would not recommend Mr. Waxler for legal support as this request took far too long and required too many back and forth communications for review for what is a very common and standard legal document.
Awesome experience with the quality of service Attorney Sarah did for my father inlaw and then for my son Thumbs up 👍.Highly recommend to family and friends.

reviews.text: I sat down to interview for an upcoming divorce. The office had taken my name prior to scheduling. I sat down and explained my side of things, agreed and was told I’d be getting an emailed cost summary and contract. I got an email minutes after leaving saying he had a conflict of interest. Yea I’d say so- he had already spoken with my EX. This behavior in my opinion seems very unethical. I am glad he did not represent me anyways as karma always comes full circle. I’m not even sure if it is ethical for him to counsel my husband given the circumstances.

Edgar Hall’s firm was the second one I contacted and I got a response the same day.
I’ve got to say, the first local I called wasn’t as willing to help as Edgar did. I was able to send a message through Avvo with little detail and he was able to guide me towards a path where I can feel safer tackling the issue at hand.

Thank you for the guidance and for listening to my case

If you are researching a lawyer to represent your interests, I will assume you are feeling a little bit of stress and or anxiety. Rarely do we seek out the services of a lawyer under extremely happy circumstances, at least that wasn’t the case for my husband! My husband faced the unknown and needed someone he could trust and believe in to get him through it.  As his caregiver and wife it was up to me to find the appropriate person for the job.  I wasn’t sure if I could believe all the raving reviews I read about Edgar Hall of Washington Debt Law; I was skeptical such a beloved lawyer could even exist.  By the time I hung up from my first conversation with him though, I absolutely KNEW I had an ally! Bankruptcy is an incredibly long and difficult journey for anyone, for those with a Traumatic Brain Injury accompanied by PTSD it can become compounded by confusion, eventually becoming debilitatingly difficult. Edgar Hall and his staff of dedicated assistants were always professional and eager to assist with each bump in the road that we experienced. Mr. Hall’s expertise and finesse was EXACTLY what was needed to successfully navigate the ordeal; I could not recommend him more highly for any legal matter that he covers! I hope that we never need his services again; yet, I feel confident that if we do, we will be just fine! Thank you Edgar Hall (and staff) for your dedication, diligence, and even compassion; you are more than a dream-come-true-lawyer!

I called for advice or representation for a medical debt incurred by my stepson's low-life mother that was attached to me for marrying the father.  His advice was useful with a few pointers to look for in my case.  Although, the debt was not worth the attorney fees to hire him,  I would recommend this firm based on the advice I was given.

reviews.text:
My family and I have been working with Nur Law for several years now, specifically with Mr. Omar Nur, and our experience has consistently been outstanding. Over the years, he has assisted us with a wide range of legal matters, from traffic tickets to general legal guidance, and every time we have felt supported, informed, and confident that our case was in the right hands. Mr. Nur is professional, responsive, and truly dedicated to helping his clients achieve the best possible outcomes.

Most recently, Mr. Nur represented us in a personal injury claim after an insurance company refused to properly compensate us. What initially felt like a stressful and frustrating situation quickly became manageable once he took over the case. He handled all communication with the insurance company, explained every step of the process clearly, and fought on our behalf to make sure we were treated fairly. Thanks to his persistence and expertise, the issue was resolved efficiently, and we received a settlement check in a surprisingly short amount of time.

What stands out most about Mr. Nur is not only his legal knowledge but also his genuine care for his clients. Sometimes I give him a call or a text at a time after hours and he still responds. He takes the time to listen, answers questions patiently, and makes sure you fully understand your options. and talks to you like family, not a client.

We highly recommend Nur Law and Mr. Omar Nur to anyone looking for a knowledgeable, dependable, and results driven attorney. Our family will continue to work with him for years to come.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your continued trust in Nur Law. It’s been an honor to represent your family.

We’re glad we could step in on your personal injury claim, handle the insurance company, and secure a fair resolution. Helping our clients feel supported while we fight for the compensation they deserve is always our goal.

We truly appreciate your recommendation.

reviews.text:
I am incredibly grateful to Joel Nichols for his outstanding legal representation. After six months of constant stress and back-and-forth in a very delicate lawsuit against my employer, I was finally able to achieve justice through a fair settlement. This outcome would not have been possible without him.
Joel Nichols consistently demonstrated the highest level of professionalism and ethics. He was knowledgeable, thorough, and strategic, while always being honest and transparent about the process. What truly set him apart was his empathy and understanding. He genuinely recognized how stressful this situation was for me and approached my case with patience, compassion, and respect.
He took the time to explain everything clearly and made me feel supported and confident throughout the entire process. If you’re looking for an attorney who combines legal expertise with integrity and genuine care for their clients, I highly recommend Joel Nichols.

Kudos to Paulette, who went above and beyond to provide a thorough intake, ask all the right questions and provide a warm and professional demeanor that instilled confidence immediately.

I recommend working with this firm.

Highly Recommend Deno Millikan Law Firm, PLLC. They gave my child and me a future we can count on. I especially want to thank Patrick Songy and the entire team at Deno Millikan Law Firm, PLLC for the exceptional care, skill, and compassion they showed throughout my child-custody case. From the very first consultation, they listened without judgment, explained every step in plain language, and built a strategy that put my child’s best interest first. They were always available (texts answered on weekends, late-night calls returned promptly) and made me feel like I wasn’t facing this alone. If you’re looking for a custody lawyer who will fight hard for you and still treat you like family, look no further, Deno Millikan Law Firm, PLLC is your best choice.

Emma Hill assisted us with guardianship of our brother. The legal terms and court deadlines were a challenge for me to comprehend (why can't they use plain English?) and Emma was there to patiently, calmly and knowledgeably walk us through the process. We definitely will use Emma and the Law firm for any future legal needs we may have!

Patrick Songy and Denecia are the best!  I had a complicated estate to be taken care of and they did a great job!  It took 26 months to complete and they guided me every step of the way.  Patrick keep me posted at all times.  I would recommend them to anyone needing legal help!

This is the second time I've worked with Joel Nichols. Once when my mother passed away and this time, a workplace matter. Joel is knowledgeable and professional. He  really listens when you talk. One thing that I appreciate is that you get a breakdown of exactly how your money is spent. Not every law firm does that.  And referencing a previous comment, they are NOT the most expensive in the area. I spent more with another lawyer and had to switch to Deno-Milliken.
I needed legal counsel for a time-sensitive personal matter. Laura Unterseher was quick to take the lead and get the situation under control. I recommend Laura and the team at DM.

Lawyers Alexandra VanBelle and Patrick Songy of Deno Millikan took on our family law case after getting no call backs from several other firms. It was my first time having to hire a lawyer and they talked me through everything and did a fantastic job navigating the newer and less common defacto parenting law.
They were always available to answer questions and guide us through the difficult process. Thank you Alex and Patrick for helping us get the legal parenting rights for our grandchildren!

I recently had the pleasure of working with Joel Nichols. When my existing attorney was no longer available, I reached out to Joel.  He jumped right in without missing a beat.  He brought my case to resolution in the few short months I worked with him.  I loved his approach to being fully transparent - good or bad - and how often he would communicate, even if there wasn't an update.
I'm pleased with the outcome of my case, and will work with Joel for any legal items I have in the future.
He truly is the best and such a kind and caring man.
Working with Joel and Megan was a great experience. We've used them twice now for our business with very positive results.

I had the pleasure of working with Joel Nichols on an employment matter and I could not have been more pleased.  Joel, responded quickly to my initial outreach, and was prompt in all matters pertaining to my case.

Joel also provided me with his truthful opinion regarding my case and help me to reach conclusion without unnecessary fees.

I would without question recommend Joel Nichols to anyone needing an employment attorney.

Stephanie Petersen is an excellent divorce attorney. Her team was exceptionally friendly and easy to work with. Everyone in her office was accommodating and supportive. I have worked with her over the last 2 years on a very complicated case that took a while to finalize, and not because of our lack of willingness to cooperate. If you need a knowledgeable, thorough, and professional attorney she is highly capable of getting the work done and closing the case.

I will not be going forth with this law firm. Daneesha was rude and I could tell from the start that she was uninterested in wanting to help or gather any details. She made me feel like my issue was wasting her time.

Deno Millikan Law boasts an exceptional team committed to client success. If you're seeking legal representation, I highly recommend this firm. Patrick Songy is a standout attorney – he provides swift responses, addresses concerns proactively, and fights for the best outcome.

It's hard to fully express my gratitude for Patrick Songy's dedication. He genuinely listened, understood my goals, and guided me through every stage of the process.

For anyone facing complex legal challenges, entrust your case to Deno Millikan Law. Their expertise and genuine care are unmatched. I wholeheartedly endorse their services.

I've used Brian Dale and Patrick Songy with Deno Millikan for years and most recently yesterday; They continue to be excellent lawyers and give very straightforward and honest advice. They've advised me on business law and divorce law. They are my attorneys for life.

I used Deno Millikan for a straightforward divorce mediation case. The attorney was helpful and attentive in the in-person session.

Unfortunately, every other aspect of working with this firm was terrible. Literally every single step of the process required repeatedly calling/emailing the firm before they followed through. Documents were prepared incorrectly. It took 2 months to get a check for the remaining balance on my account.

I would recommend going somewhere else.
Spoke to some nice people.  Unfortunately my case was not something they handled, but were nice enough to refer me to someone else.
I was a client of Erika at Deno Millikan. She was very helpful and professional. She made completing my divorce much easier and I would highly recommend using Deno Millikan for your legal needs.

Erica and her team did such a wonderful job for me and my kids. I can't thank them enough. They got my kids and me a court ruling that gave us security and comfort. They helped my stepdaughter come live with me as well. I couldn't be more happy. And when things were tight with my budget they let me make payments. If ever I need a attorney they are my first call. Thanks again!

Thank you so much for all the services And I apologize for all the difficulties.

I was represented by Erika Reichley, at that time I had  another attorney handle another case , at a very cheap price. she convinced me to give her the other case because according to her , we needed to win otherwise it will affect the case I hired her for, which I did, sadly.
After the other case was done, she  told me she can’t help me with the case I hired her for because the limit status on that case was overdue.
I had this concerns of limited status on my first meeting with her and she told me the limited status was overrule when health is involved. She played me.
She was so expensive I couldn’t hired someone else to continue my case I had to drop it. Her dishonesty and greed  is affecting my life until today since children are involved.
she used me for money and discarded me. I feel like working with a heartless individual, a rock. She Never did the job I hired her for in the first place.
Too bad we have individual like that in this world.

It’s all about money for this law firm five years ago I retained an attorney for my case all the attorney did was go to the hearings and kept getting continuances…. My retainer was drained getting continuances no results on my case I ended up with a large balance but no work done on my file. Next thing I knew the attorney could not represent me anymore because his wife passed away I was left with no legal representation and a large bill that I could not afford. The agreement was that Anything beyond retainer will not be charged to me due to him not being able to represent me for his own personal matter. A few years later I find out The amount was never cleared by him and now sits on my credit report I am a single mom and it has been affecting my credit and a very large scale I tried to get a hold of the attorney a few times front desk always puts me off and never got a callback Over the years. I hope they try to resolve this issue because it has affected me on a very large scale of things not to mention the amount is in the $8000 range that I can’t even begin to think about paying off anytime soon. The harassment I get from the collection agency on a different level. … It is very stressful.
Stay away from this law firm!!!!!

If you have a problem contact these people as they have the experience and the out of the box ability to Argue in your best interest. I thank them for helping me in legal matters that could have ruined my life. Joel was the best legal representative I  have had in my life! Granted I have had few brushes with the law. Despite that by far Joel Nichols is the most professional and in my eyes successful at what he does. My case was for unemployment and he countered and won it with his score long knowledge and experience.
Open, honest, direct, proactive and just plain likeable.

I highly recommend this law firm, and Erika Reichley in particular.

reviews.text: My husband and I found Skelton Law firm, after interviewing a couple other firms that didn’t quite meet our needs. Haley met with us for our first meeting, we went over a list of debts, and she proposed the plan and cost. We liked her so much that we retained her that day. We then we exchanged emails and phone calls until all necessary paperwork was collected, and the online courses (2) were completed.  We met with Haley once more to make sure everything was correct. We then received our finalization through the mail. She made everything understandable and simple.  Susan Skelton was very helpful as well.  Very kind and patient with us too. Huge thanks to Richard and his team at the Ingress immigration for guiding my wife’s I‑485 application—his advice and presence at the interview gave us peace of mind and ensured a successful outcome.
Thank you

I’m incredibly grateful to my immigration lawyer Richard and the Paralegal Celeste for their amazing support throughout my residency process. They were always attentive, communicative, and genuinely dedicated to helping me every step of the way. From the beginning, they made sure I was fully prepared with all the necessary documents and explained everything clearly so I always understood what was happening.

Celeste went above and beyond — even during her pregnancy and after having her baby, she stayed in touch and made sure everything in my case was handled on time. That level of dedication and kindness meant so much to me and my family.

Both of them were always easy to talk to, patient with my questions, and made me feel calm and confident during a very stressful process. I never felt lost or worried because they were always available and ready to help.

Thanks to their professionalism, compassion, and hard work, my case was approved and I’m now a legal U.S. resident. I couldn’t have asked for a better team. I highly recommend them to anyone needing honest, caring, and knowledgeable immigration help!

I am so grateful to God for putting a good lawyer in my path. I came to this country after going through a terrible ordeal in my home country due to political persecution. I am so grateful for all the help and preparation my case received from attorney Richard Somade and his team. Thank God I was able to obtain the immigration relief I was applying for. I wholeheartedly recommend attorney Somade and his team if you are looking for professional help and someone who is truly interested in your case. I highly recommend this firm. Thank you so much, attorney!

For a long time after arriving in the United States, I searched for a good lawyer to represent me and guide me through the complex immigration court process. Years later, I found the office of attorney Richard Somade and his team. Mr. Somade was not only attentive from our first consultation, which was free, but he also helped me feel more confident when I went to my immigration court hearing. I must say, my hearing was very complex and difficult, but thanks to the lawyer who supported me throughout, I was able to find the self-confidence I needed to face the judge, and I am truly grateful for his moral and human support. I recommend Mr. Richard Somade of Ingress Legal for your immigration matters if you are looking for a lawyer with a human touch.

After 25 years in this country, today I received my permanent resident green card. All of this was made possible by God first and for the blessing of finding attorney Richard Somade of Ingress Legal. The attorney and his team have been excellent in the quality of the work they did on my case. They guided me every step of the way, and I felt very supported. Attorney Richard was super accessible and attentive in answering every question I had before and during my application process. I 100% recommend Attorney Richard based on my personal experience. I am extremely satisfied with the work he did on my case. I am so happy to receive my green card in less than six months. I don't know how they made it possible, but it was possible. Thank you so much!
You can tell they care about customers. I’m more than satisfied.
Very pleased, the legal advice has been very helpful and the professional commitment with which they operate leaves me very satisfied.

My experience with this law firm has been exceptional. The way they handled my case from beginning to end was impressive. They demonstrated a deep understanding of the law, breaking down the most complex aspects of my situation in a way that I could perfectly understand.

I am very grateful for the service I received at this Immigration Ingress Legal office. From the very beginning, the staff was friendly, patient, and very professional. They provided me with clear and accurate information and guided me step by step through the entire process.

The environment is neat, clean, and organized, which conveys trust and professionalism. I especially thank the entire staff for their willingness to answer my questions and help me with the necessary forms.

I 100% recommend this office to anyone who needs to process immigration paperwork. Thank you for your excellent work!

Thanks to his commitment and expertise, I was finally granted asylum, and I will always be grateful for his guidance and encouragement throughout this long journey.  Thanks to his dedicated staff Celeste who also worked with me during the process.  I highly recommend  Attorney Richard. ( Ingress legal) to anyone seeking an immigration attorney who is not only skilled but also genuinely cares about their clients.

Ms. McCallum represented me in a lengthy divorce and custody battle that involved trials and appeals at the WA State Supreme court on multiple occasions.  Being a man exercising his rights as a father in the state of Washington I had low expectations as to the outcome of my case; today, thanks to Ms. McCallum, I am the custodian of my three children and enjoy a happy loving relationship with them every day.  Going from bi-weekly visitation to full custody of my children was nothing short of a miracle.

The thought of not having my children in my life is difficult to imagine.  Had it not been for Ms. McCallum, my children would have been taken away to Alabama and I would have been relegated to the role of estranged father with little more than the annual two-week summer visitation.

It is with deep gratitude and appreciation for Ms. McCallum, that I highly recommend her for anyone seeking a family lawyer.  Considering my circumstances, and the outcomes, Ms. McCallum can best be described as a master of her craft, the best at what she does.

I was put in Areli’s hands and she was the hardest working, sweetest, most understanding, and genuinely proper ethics motivated person I could have wished for. They ensured I could make appointments to speak with them when ever I needed to. They were clear and honest about taking on the previous reps cases, how busy she was apologizing for any late replies, how she saw the age of my case, and how she would be working hard to prioritize getting it resolved. Made sure to utilize the tools provided to her to make my funds available as soon as possible while ensuing no money was owed by utilizing systems in place to do so already by law. While the others were just going in circles and making me call the lien holders myself. They did the work to track down liens ASAP and created a trust hold to ensure funds were there to pay for it. Just someone who REALLY cares and doesn’t see you like a number.

Initially I would never recommend due to value over cost as no matter if they work as properly as Areli or not. They still take 1/3 if not more of your settlement while you seemingly do most of the work and emails or forms are sent then reviewed maybe signed. You don’t talk to the lawyer I think at all during the process.

However if they ensure all their reps are trained and work as Areli does or you just request to only work with her. Then I completely recommend doing so. The pease of mind and respect alone is worth it during such a stressful time.

Which is why I put 4 stars not 5 or 1. Because of Areli and the team that took action by her request promptly when they did.

Just my honest feelings . Thank you Areli for everything you do your absolutely amazing, respectful, hard working, and honest. I’d bake you a few cakes if I could.

reviews.text:
If I could leave a review with 0 stars, I would. I hired Russell and Hill in 2015 to represent me after my 1st A.L.J. denial. I asked them if they would file a motion. With the appeals review board after explaining my situation. They said that they would, but didn't update my medical information on the motion to appeal. They also had me file a new claim at the same time. I asked them if that would affect my original filing date, which would have been 2010? They blatantly lied to me, telling me that filing a new claim would not affect my claim. THEY LIED TO ME! IT DID! I finally won in May 2021, with the help of a different attorney. But because of the new claim filed as recommended by Russell and Hill, in 2015, not only did I lose 3 more years back pay, but because of 2013 being the backdate that I was given, I CAN'T GET MY EARLY DISABILITY RETIREMENT TEAMSTER PENSION. I HAVE TO WAIT UNTIL I TURN 65 TO RECIEVE MY PENSION AFTER HAVING MY JOB FOR 19 YEARS. ALL BECAUSE OF THE BACKDATE CHANGE, I CANT GET MY RETIREMENT FROM THE TEAMSTERS UNTIL I TURN 65.
They royally screwed me over after lying to me.
reviews.ownerResponse: I will do my best to respond to your false allegations. 1. No claimant is allowed to update medical on an appeal to Federal District Court. 2. Filing a new claim did not affect your original filing date. The Federal District Court appeal was addressing your original filing date. 3. We never lied to you. We still have all our prior communications with you clearly explaining all the circumstances. 4. Your Teamster Pension has absolutely nothing to do with your social security claims. If you would like me to contact your attorney to answer any questions, I would be happy to do that. Thank you.

I knew applying for SSI benefits would most likely not be a quick process but I really had no idea yet. I found out today I was finally approved for benefits but that's only after a 4 year process. At the start of my application I had retained a lawyer to assist me thru this. But I was never happy with them. It was a firm based in Portland and I just never knew what was going on. And they never took anytime to explain certain processing of my application. But thank God my mom told me of a firm that she's used and was very happy with there care and details
So I hired Russell & Hill the next day and they have been my lawyer for well over a year. And when you appeal any decisions made by social security it' just helped and makes it all more manageable to deal with the stress if your lawyer talk to you, has great open communication and they made me feel that it's ok if I ever needed anything or had more questions or concerns that I knew Eric would always be available. And this proces is very stressful and there were times I would get upset and frustrated. But this firm has been here for me all the way and now I absolutely know that if for any reason in the future i needed representation on any other matters I fully trust that Russell & Hill could handle it and I just thank you again for ALWAYS handling my case with care and professionalism. I absolutely recommend this firm. And again thank you Eric for your great counsel.

Justin M

reviews.text:
If I could leave a review with 0 stars, I would. I hired Russell and Hill in 2015 to represent me after my 1st A.L.J. denial. I asked them if they would file a motion. With the appeals review board after explaining my situation. They said that they would, but didn't update my medical information on the motion to appeal. They also had me file a new claim at the same time. I asked them if that would affect my original filing date, which would have been 2010? They blatantly lied to me, telling me that filing a new claim would not affect my claim. THEY LIED TO ME! IT DID! I finally won in May 2021, with the help of a different attorney. But because of the new claim filed as recommended by Russell and Hill, in 2015, not only did I lose 3 more years back pay, but because of 2013 being the backdate that I was given, I CAN'T GET MY EARLY DISABILITY RETIREMENT TEAMSTER PENSION. I HAVE TO WAIT UNTIL I TURN 65 TO RECIEVE MY PENSION AFTER HAVING MY JOB FOR 19 YEARS. ALL BECAUSE OF THE BACKDATE CHANGE, I CANT GET MY RETIREMENT FROM THE TEAMSTERS UNTIL I TURN 65.
They royally screwed me over after lying to me.
reviews.ownerResponse: I will do my best to respond to your false allegations. 1. No claimant is allowed to update medical on an appeal to Federal District Court. 2. Filing a new claim did not affect your original filing date. The Federal District Court appeal was addressing your original filing date. 3. We never lied to you. We still have all our prior communications with you clearly explaining all the circumstances. 4. Your Teamster Pension has absolutely nothing to do with your social security claims. If you would like me to contact your attorney to answer any questions, I would be happy to do that. Thank you.

reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about my lawyer, Dustin Burn. From the very beginning, he showed genuine kindness and understanding. When I couldn’t afford the full cost, he lowered his price significantly to make sure I could still get the help I needed. Even when I was late on a payment, he never dropped me as a client and always treated me with respect.
Dustin not only supported me, but was also kind to my family, which meant a lot during a stressful time. He truly cares about helping people, and that’s rare to find. I also want to thank Jade, who was amazing at keeping me updated on my case. Her communication helped ease my anxiety and made sure I always knew what was going on.
When I think of what a great lawyer should be—compassionate, fair, and dedicated—I think of Dustin. I’m so grateful for both Dustin and Jade, and I would highly recommend them to anyone who needs legal help.

I knew applying for SSI benefits would most likely not be a quick process but I really had no idea yet. I found out today I was finally approved for benefits but that's only after a 4 year process. At the start of my application I had retained a lawyer to assist me thru this. But I was never happy with them. It was a firm based in Portland and I just never knew what was going on. And they never took anytime to explain certain processing of my application. But thank God my mom told me of a firm that she's used and was very happy with there care and details
So I hired Russell & Hill the next day and they have been my lawyer for well over a year. And when you appeal any decisions made by social security it' just helped and makes it all more manageable to deal with the stress if your lawyer talk to you, has great open communication and they made me feel that it's ok if I ever needed anything or had more questions or concerns that I knew Eric would always be available. And this proces is very stressful and there were times I would get upset and frustrated. But this firm has been here for me all the way and now I absolutely know that if for any reason in the future i needed representation on any other matters I fully trust that Russell & Hill could handle it and I just thank you again for ALWAYS handling my case with care and professionalism. I absolutely recommend this firm. And again thank you Eric for your great counsel.

Justin M

reviews.text:
We needed help recovering fair and equitable compensation after a horrific accident. We called multiple offices only to discuss the details with an office assistant who said they would “pass the word” and someone else would get back to us. This occurred on three separate occasions. We then found an attorney who actually called us back and said that he would love to represent us but he was too busy and provided us with Cassidy’s name. I called Cassidy’s office number and provided the accident details thinking that I was speaking to an office assistant and then heard “I would be happy to represent you” I was surprised and said “Is this the lawyer” to which she responded “Yes”. Needless to say, we were so happy to have someone who would support us!
Not only did she represent us, but we felt a trust and bond that was definitely more than we ever could have imagined. She cared and walked us through every step along the way. We ended up resolving the incident to our satisfaction and feel like we gained not only a future law expert who we would wholeheartedly refer others to, but a forever friend! Cassidy and her team are THE BEST!!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and for trusting Spencer Injury Law during such a difficult time. We’re truly glad we were able to step in, communicate clearly, and help move your case toward a fair resolution. Making the process understandable and as stress-free as possible is always our goal. Wishing you and your family all the best, and thank you again for taking the time to share your experience working with us!

Cassidy is an outstanding attorney who truly puts clients first. As a fellow litigator, I can highly recommend her.  She handles serious personal injury matters—including traumatic brain injuries, trucking accidents, and nursing home cases—with compassion and unmatched expertise. From the very beginning, Cassidy makes herself accessible, communicates clearly, and ensures her clients feel supported through every step of their case and beyond.

As a seasoned litigator and trial attorney, her attention to detail and exceptional writing skills set her apart. She crafts persuasive motions, prepares meticulously, and fights tirelessly for the best possible outcome. Beyond the courtroom, Cassidy’s deep roots in the community where she was born and raised make her approachable and relatable—qualities that bring comfort to clients facing some of the hardest moments in their lives.

If you need a lawyer who combines skill, integrity, and genuine care, I wholeheartedly recommend Cassidy.

The Fifth Amendment breaks down into five rights or protections: the right to a jury trial when you're charged with a crime, protection against double jeopardy, protection against self-incrimination, the right to a fair trial, and protection against the taking of property by the government without compensation.

I would like to start off with the fact that I got in a situation that I was facing a whole lot of trouble serious trouble and I really did not know what to do and I needed some serious help. I asked for guidance, and I made a phone call and Lauren pick up the call and the minute I spoke with her I knew that I just found the right person everything told me that this lady is an extraordinarily strong one and I was led to giving her a call. At the beginning of all this I was very distraught, and Lauren was very compassionate, but she never gave me false hope on anything, and she gave me nothing but hard love never trying to patty cake anything but always when I was incredibly stressed and down, she asked me to trust her, and she would take care of me. Lauren never gave up; the first victory was something that I thought would never happen and she won the DOL Case which blew me away. She asked me to do a lot of things and told me to follow up and follow through and I did. There were times that she would push out the dates ask the court for a continuance, and I was getting frustrated because it was taking a long time, but I continued to trust in her. Near the end of this she talked to me about an agreement, and I said OK if that is what you think is best and that day of court without me knowing she asked for another continuance I was confused but I had nothing left but to trust and believe in her. The day before my final court date I was ready to accept my fate and if anybody understands the fourth quarter the last minute the 3 point Shot to win the game I was completely blown away that Lauren did not stop did not concede she fought for me to the very last second she told me that she now negotiated a deal they could not fight, she won the game this woman is unbelievable and very strong, very reliable and I would trust her with anything. I have never been so impressed by somebody, her negotiating skills professional skills everything about Lauren is impressive. No jail time, interlock was immediately removed no house arrest nothing. I am so grateful to have had her help and I would recommend her to anybody. I will always be grateful for what Lauren did for me.  Thank you so very much Lauren Wegener. You are the best.
Tony
