We cannot express our gratitude enough for the outstanding legal representation we received from Jasmine Mitchell. In the midst of a highly emotional and complex custody battle, she demonstrated unparalleled professionalism, compassion, and knowledge.

From the initial consultation, it was evident that she genuinely cared about the well-being of our family and was committed to securing the best outcome for our child. Her in-depth knowledge of family law and sharp legal skills were evident throughout the entire process.

Jasmine provided clear communication, keeping us informed at every stage of the case. Her attention to detail, thorough research, and timely responses were crucial in building a case that ultimately led to a successful outcome.

Closing this ongoing custody case was a pivotal moment for my family, and I credit Jasmine for her unwavering support and tireless efforts. If you find yourself facing similar challenges, I wholeheartedly recommend her services. Five stars are not just a rating but a testament to the exceptional quality of Jasmines legal expertise and genuine commitment to her clients.
They will handle your business

Damon never responds to your emails and then charge you from them.  The only way he will respond is if you say something that will easily offend him.  I battled 2 1/2 years for custody of my now 3 year son.  His legal assistant Hannah is amazing, a great writer, and understanding when communicated with. Damon did win my case about not allowing the mother to move further away to Seattle but other hearings he was not prepared for and he knew my son was too young for anything to happen at the beginning but would continue to take my money.  The first order he did not get signed so the mother got away with contempt until it was actually signed and three months later was found in contempt but the mother did not have an attorney and she still was able to get the exchange location closer to her house. Damon takes on too many cases to have in his plate.  He also belittled the security guy at the courthouse saying he takes his job too seriously for his hourly wage boasting that he makes more money than him.  If you want a fast response in emails don’t hire Damon. His legal assistant would have done better.   I got full custody of my son with Veronica Freitas.  You need to hire Veronica she is the best check her reviews.

I reached out to Damon as I was referred to him by somebody I trust and saw the negative reviews posted here on Google.  Damon was very gracious and spent time explaining, without breaking any confidentiality, why those negative reviews are posted.

Thereafter, Damon provided incredible insight into my current situation, the legal representative for my former spouse, and the process moving forward.  He provided incredibly valuable information pertaining particularly to my situation that likely means I can avoid engaging an attorney altogether and handle my situation via mediation.

I can't recommend Damon highly enough.  He is a fantastic attorney with an incredible base of knowledge and did not attempt to have me retain his services when he assessed that my situation could be handled without that expense.

If you are seeking a highly regarded, experienced family law attorney who has high integrity and morals, you should definitely consider Damon.

Should I need to engage a family law attorney in future, I will not hesitate to engage Damon.

I feel my entire case was misrepresented and since I have with drawn from their services I have successfully won my family law case on my own, I feel if I had represented my case from the beginning I would have ended with a much better outcome as court shifted gears into my favor entirely after not being represented my this law firm. I have never had an attorney in any case prior but felt with my situation it was needed as I was trying to relocate with my children. It has put a horrible taste in my mouth and I will never choose to be represented ever again. My local court facilitator helped me the most!

I ended my relationship with Mr. Canfield this morning. I would absolutely recommend going somewhere else for legal help.

I ended the relationship because Mr. Canfield and his team have been a roadblock to getting a divorce finished in a timely manner, and have in my opinion, contributed directly to me having to pay many thousands of dollars in unnecessary spousal support, due to unnecessary delays.

Many promises were broken. In my initial conversation with Mr. Canfield I had 30 days to wait before I could file a petition for divorce and he promised that we would file the petition on day 30. After multiple weeks of ignored emails day 30 arrived, and his office claimed that some paperwork had not been finished by me. This is not true. I have worked long hours and weekends to try to move this forward. The filing of the petition was delayed so long that my wife's lawyers filed first, meaning I paid Mr. Canfield for many hours of work, that were in the end useless.

The team is unresponsive. They don't acknowledge receipt of emails. It took on average two weeks for someone to respond, and only after I called an emailed to ask what is going on. Even after asking them to please acknowledge that they received my emails, and their agreement to do so, they only acknowledged maybe one out of 2.

In situations that were emergencies, they were extremely slow to respond. I needed a quit claim deed from my wife, or I would have lost my bid for a house as well as $20k in earnest money. I explained very clearly the urgency of the situation and that I had about 30 days. The delays with Mr. Canfield's team forced me to have to negotiate with the seller to move the closing date 3 times. I was very lucky that things finally worked out, but it was due to my effort and in spite of the hold up from Mr. Canfield.

It was so long in between meetings with Mr. Canfield that he and his team had completely forgotten all the details of my case and I had to spend valuable time re-explaining the situation in most meetings.

The last straw was the task of getting a mediation scheduled. In October my wife's attorneys suggested a mediation date (1/5/2023) and preferred mediators. I asked Mr. Canfield to schedule a date for mediation for that date or sooner. This was on 11/15/2022. On December 29th I get a list of potential dates with potential mediators. This is a full 6 weeks after my request, and it is only informational. We still haven't scheduled a date for mediation. This is completely unacceptable. I am currently paying $6k in monthly spousal support. In addition to lawyer's fees this means every month of delay costs an additional $6k. This 6 week delay cost about $9k.

I am utterly disappointed, to put it mildly. I have heard that Mr. Canfield is an excellent lawyer, but I assume that requires him to give your case attention.
Jennifer, is an amazing lawyer, she worked very hard to get us a great result.

Jennifer Bitner is extremely smart, hard-working, knowledgeable, caring and appropriately assertive.  She is honest, dedicated and fiscally aware.  We have been so very proud to have her representation and support for our family.

JENNIFER MARIE BITNER -Ms. Bitner was my ex husbands attorney, and still give her a 5/5.
Simple, Assertive, pleasant to be around. She's herself, and I like that about her.

Mr. Canfield supported me through a challenging child support case. I appreciate his realism and confidence through the process. I am thankful to have chosen this law firm. He has an efficient paralegal who quickly responds. Very helpful!

I do not recommend these lawyers , they don't have no ethic and they pretend to be on your side they just want your money but their are with the opposite side and they are lazy and let the opposite side do all the job ,don't know  anything when he's on court .his late.moody(with a rude  attitude and the Judge asked him a question and the opposite lawyer answered because his not capable of anwering he asked everything do the opposite lawyer and they put everything on favor to the other side be careful with these lawyers don't trust them...
reviews.ownerResponse: This individual was never a client of Canfield Madow Law Group. Based upon the name, we assume this is a relative of a former client of Adam Strand, whose employment with this office ended at the end of May 2020 and who now works for Galloway Law Group.

reviews.text: In my experience probate is basically a process of the client gathering information and the attorney completing standardized forms and filing them with the court which seems straightforward and could be done by  anyone with attention to detail.  However I found errors (such as missing beneficiary and incorrect names and amounts) in every set of documents Pat McKenzie sent me.  To make matters worse he was condescending to the point of insult.  I cannot in good conscience recommend him for probate services.
Dani did everything she said she'd do.

If possible, I would not give any stars. This review is about Ms. Dannielle Pratt and what should have been a simple divorce case between two elderly people.
One was 89 and the other was 86. Between the two of them they did not have much to split in the way of assets. In the beginning the two parties involved had agreed to a 50/50 split of assets and the divorce decree was filled out and filed with Snohomish County District Court. At this time there were no lawyers involved. For some reason during the ninety-day reconciliation period, Ms. Pratt became my step mother’s attorney and they contested the divorce decree.
This divorce dragged on and took 2 years to get finalized because of the ridiculous demands that were asked for and did not get, as well as Ms. Pratt sitting on her laurels basically ignoring my dad’s attorney and not responding to the required legal documents. The mediation was also an expensive part of the process and ended with no agreement. During the mediation my father’s offers were turned down and if Ms. Pratt had directed her client to except, they would have received more monies than what they agreed to in the final divorce agreement. It was sad to watch a lawyer put two elderly people through a stressful and mental mind game for 2 years. I know what my father spent on his attorney fees which took all of his savings, so my ex-step mother must have spent around the same and used all of her savings. So, the monies they had agreed upon splitting 50/50 in the beginning went to attorney fees. To sum it up the expenses incurred in this divorce has more than likely depleted two elderly people’s savings accounts.
In addition, it is a sad fact that Ms. Pratt waited 5 weeks to process orders that gave her client a death benefit in the event my father passed away.
I wrote this review because I feel it is important for the public to know how Ms. Pratt conducted herself in this divorce case. I have no ill will towards my ex- step mother and I don’t think she had an attorney looking out for her best interest. This also cost my 89 now 90-year-old father unnecessary expenses for his attorney
On the Mill Creek Law Website, Ms. Pratts profile states she is an advocate for the elderly. After watching my father and ex- step mother go through what I witnessed, I would have to say that is not the case. I don’t understand why Ms. Pratt made 2 elderly people wait so long to close an easy case.

David C.
reviews.ownerResponse: It is clearly evident from this review that the poster was not and has never been a client of Ms. Pratt, and that said review it is not made on behalf of any client of our firm.  Dissatisfaction of an opposing party is expected in these matters when we secure good results for our clients. We would not expect an opposing party or their family members to be as satisfied as our clients.

reviews.text: I didn't get the help I needed here. I chose another law firm because the wait time for an appointment was too long.

Stalwarts of the legal profession. Decades of high quality support for my personal property and business issues. Yes, it can be tough to get a hold of a specific lawyer sometimes, given their ongoing court schedules. But if you want something done right, give the task to a busy team. There is a good reason they are busy.
It would be helpful if they returned emails. They don't.

They help my stepmom & me with an issue that we needed to take care of. They did it quick and easily for us.
Thank you again.

Very disappointed
After a great consult and high hopes of a quick resolution it has now taken over a year and the estate issues still are not resolved.
I have waited over a month to get the final paperwork which still is not completed and it is as of now, unknown as to how much longer it's going to be.
Danielle Pratt nor Helga Watson return calls or emails in a timely manner if at all.
Near impossible to think about even getting a response.
The did however get the estate dispute settled as hoped but it was not without lengthy and unnecessary delays by both Mill Creek Law and the other party.
For what they charged, the service they provided, the headaches and anxiety indured they are not worth it
Deadlines never met and on and on.
I will update this review upon finalizing the estate
Worked with Pat McKenzie on my mothers estate. He was very unhelpful and condescending. I would not recommend him.
Pat McKenzie estate knowledgeable and helpful

After a very helpful consultation with Bill Sullivan about another family law issue, I had high hopes for a positive experience with this firm when referred to Jenna Liske for help filing a simple Intent to Move and Child Support Reevaluation. Jenna did eventually file the Intent to Move form, but nine months, and many phone calls and emails from me later, the reevaluation of child support had not moved forward at all, despite all required information having been submitted by both sides. I had little to no communication from Jenna. In fact, the proposal for adjusted child support had not even been formally sent to the other parent for review. Eventually, I just gave up and decided to go elsewhere. Fortunately, I didn't lose too much money, because most of what I was charged for was the time spent for her to take the phone calls from me and review the emails I sent inquiring when the process would move forward. Nothing was followed up on. The lack of professionalism was quite astounding. I would not go with this firm if you need help with a relatively simple and easy (and therefore not very lucrative for them) family law issue. If it wasn't worth her time, I would have appreciated being told no thank you, so I could have avoided the retainer deposit and nearly a year of wasted time.

I met with Pat Mckenzie to go over my estate planning.  I explained to him I was not at all familiar with what had been done previously.  He told me what he thought I should have without explaining anything.  When I told him I did not understand what he was proposing he started talking to me in the most condescending way I have ever experienced from a professional.  He made no attempt to explain anything.  Just told me what I needed without telling me what it was for.  Even suggested I may have problems with my memory.  Eventually I said that we didn't seem to get along.  At that point he told me he did not want to represent me and to pick up my files from the front desk.  I was recommended to this firm by my former lawyer Lyle Wilson who has since retired.  We had a great relationship.  I have never had an experience like the one i've had with Mr. Mckenzie.  So now I will move on.
Danielle Pratt advised me with my will. Very thorough and a pleasant staff.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Linda! It was a pleasure helping you!

reviews.text: Honest. Concise. Determined.
Very nice and very professional
I can't rate them when I didn't meet with them  , I couldn't get past the secretary to get advice
reviews.ownerResponse: We apologize for your frustration. Our assistants are trained to communicate with potential clients to determine what attorney would be the best fit for your need so that a consultation could be set up. We are happy to set up a consultation pursuant to our established procedures.

reviews.text: Very responsive to all questions and concerns.

I called and even though they were not going to be taking on my case a nice person by the name of Michelle called me back with other attorneys that would.. she was so nice and caring and answered all my questions and if she didn't have an answer she told me who would or where I could get more information on any subject that was in question.. no one does that anymore especially I  this day and age. Thanks for everything Michelle!!! You are absolutely wonderful!!!!!!!!
They never return calls or emails...  extremely disappointed with this company
Stand up people
Great advice and counsel.

Christine Ahn is an excellent lawyer and a pleasure to work with. She really listens to you, respects you, offers different solutions, returns your email/phone calls quickly and is on the ball with paperwork and court dates. I would recommend Christine to anyone who is looking for an intelligent lawyer and wants to get the job done ASAP.

I recommend Genesis LAW FIRM, I had the pleasure of working with Tiantian Zhu, and I  recommend her enough. She is professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly thorough in everything she does.  Tiantian Zhu communicates clearly, follows through on every detail, and genuinely cares about achieving the best outcome. Every time I needed help she answer and help me go through the process she was never late always in point always answering my calls and emails. Her dedication and professionalism truly stand out. If you’re looking for someone who will handle your case with care, integrity, and expertise, Tiantian Zhu is an excellent choice. I trust her amazing work she is so smart , I am
100% satisfied with the outcome of my case

Ranae is a powerhouse. During my custody case, I felt like I had a whole law firm behind me because of how hard she works. She is organized, aggressive when she needs to be, and stayed on top of every single detail. I’m so grateful to have had her in my corner—she’s simply the best at what she does.

I am extremely grateful for the guidance I received from Sean Hyde and the staff at Genesis Law during my divorce.  It was such a difficult and emotional time but Sean was  compassionate and professional.  He helped me understand the process and I always felt like he had time for my questions and concerns. He got me a good outcome at the end of a long, complicated case. I highly recommend him to anyone needing family law support.

I had an exceptional experience with my divorce attorney, Ghdeer. After consulting with two other attorneys, I felt overwhelmed, vulnerable, and as though my entire world had fallen apart. It also felt like others were trying to take advantage of my situation. Ghdeer was completely different. Instead of immediately asking for an upfront deposit, he focused entirely on what was truly in my best interest.

After he carefully reviewing my circumstances, Ghdeer thoughtfully advised me to first have an open conversation with my ex before moving forward with filing. This advice demonstrated remarkable professionalism, patience, and genuine care for my well-being. His integrity, clear guidance, and client-first approach truly set him apart.

Because of Ghdeer’s advice, I saved a significant amount of money and was able to resolve my divorce fairly and efficiently. I am incredibly grateful for his support and highly recommend Ghdeer to anyone seeking an honest, compassionate, and knowledgeable divorce attorney. Thank you Ghdeer and the whole team!

Christine was great to work with through my divorce case. She was very attentive and made sure that I was in the know through-out the process. I'd recommend the Genesis Law Firm based on my personal experience with them.

I don’t write reviews lightly, but I feel genuinely compelled to share my experience.

From start to finish, Attorney Sean Hyde of Genesis Law Firm worked harder for me than anyone else involved in my divorce. I was coming out of domestic violence and navigating an extremely toxic, high-conflict situation, and for the first time in the legal process, I felt truly seen, heard, and respected.

I was listened to and was never judged. And more importantly, I was fiercely advocated for.

Sean fought relentlessly to ensure I was treated fairly, and because of his dedication and strategy, I received an outcome that I honestly believe I could not have achieved without him. The result was not just legally fair — it was life-changing.

If you are facing a divorce and need an attorney who will work tirelessly, stand up for you, and take your case personally in the best possible way, I cannot recommend him highly enough.

I am so grateful to Attorney Christine Ahn of Genesis Law Firm, PLLC for her professionalism, dedication, and guidance throughout my divorce process. She was knowledgeable, responsive, and consistently clear in explaining each step, which gave me confidence during a very stressful time. Christine handled my case with care, integrity, and strong attention to detail, always advocating for my best interests. In addition, her services were very affordable and transparent, which I truly appreciated. I highly recommend her to anyone seeking a dependable, compassionate, and cost-effective divorce attorney.

Christine, of Genesis Law, is amazing- helpful, knowledgeable and patient. I sincerely appreciate her for ensuring that we are both protected in a complicated divorce. Should I require legal again, I’ll start with Christine Ahn.

Sean was really good as my attorney. He explained the law to me, what expectations were, what I needed to do to help him with the case, kept me informed throughout the case. It was a really good experience, and he was very helpful.
Marya was very helpful and understanding she was very patient and went through my case step by step I was lucky to get her consultation for my case she is the best lawyer

Ghdeer Al-Abdal has been a pleasure to work with. He has gone far above my expectations. I have recommended him to all of my colleagues. I highly recommend him to all who need honest and winning representation.

David is an absolutely amazing attorney! He is both knowledgeable and caring. He substantially helped me in negotiating my high conflict divorce w/ children and a home involved. I recommend David to everyone seeking an attorney for their divorce/custody/child support agreements.

My divorce was not a simple situation, and it involved years of legal work and ultimately went to trial because of its complexity. They stood by me through every step with patient,  incredibly prepared, even when things became stressful or overwhelming. I felt heard, supported, and represented with integrity. I’m thankful for their hard work and highly recommend them.

I talked to several attorneys before finding Rob and he was the first person who made me feel heard and not overwhelmed. He made time to talk with me right away and walked me through what to expect, from deposition and mediation to trial, all in a really calm and realistic way. Throughout my case he was steady, prepared, and genuinely supportive during a very stressful time in my life.

His pricing was fair and his paralegal Alex is truly a gem. Together they helped me get through a situation that had me worried for months. I am really grateful for both of them and highly recommend Rob and Genesis Law Firm.
I tried to do my divorce on my own and I only got so far but I called up Genesis law and Marya helped me along the way which was a great help I'm very pleased with my outcome

I have been working with Robert Weinzierl for an extremely complicated divorce case. I just want to say that I really don’t know what I would have done had I not had him as my attorney. Rob is extremely professional, understanding, extremely informative, honest and has supported me throughout the process. He has always cared about my rights and I can see that he truly wants what is best for his clients. My case went as far as going to trial and Robert was able to help me get what I truly deserve and more. I really can’t thank him enough and would like to say to anyone working with him you are in good hands.

I have worked with marya and David Goodwin both, they were helpful, educated,responsive and supportive to my case. I would recommend them to anyone who needed someone to walk along side of them who is honest, educated, and supportive.

Heather Cooper took over my case from another attorney who had ignored my requests regarding my divorce. Heather, from the law firm, referred me to Mark Molay, and both of them worked hard on my case. Within just a week, they were able to recover half of the money that had been taken from me, along with all of my belongings in the first settlement. We completed the second settlement within a few months, thanks to their excellent communication and strong work ethic. I truly appreciate their professionalism and dedication — highly recommended law firm!

Marya (Mar) is a well versed family law professional with many years of experience, which shows in her approach to family law cases for her clients.  She fights fiercely with her entire heart/soul for the best interest of her clients and their family.  I especially appreciate her ability to see family law cases through a broader lens.  She is a family law subject matter expert and tactician.  Mar is a true ambassador for her clients and I have been humbly grateful to have her on my side.

I am thankful to Sean Moore and Abby Lo who helped me and my wife in our immigration case. They are awesome to work with and explain everything in a clear and concise manner. They did such a good job that our immigration process concluded in just 5 months which is much faster than expected. I highly recommend Sean and Abby for any immigration related cases. Thank you very much Sean and Abby!

I’m so grateful for the amazing team at this firm. Marya, my LLT, was such a blessing to work with — she was kind, patient, and made sure I always understood what was happening. She truly cared and supported me through the whole process.

Robert, my lawyer, was outstanding. He fought for me and always had my best interests at heart.

Together, Marya and Robert made a stressful situation so much easier to navigate. I can’t thank them enough for everything they did for me, and I would absolutely recommend them to anyone who needs legal help.
Wonderful Law firm. Very good communication. Took care of my K1 visa process perfectly and we passed with immigration in I think less then 9 months of application being submitted.
I worked with Marya and I highly recommend working with her it was a smooth process she always responds in a more than timely manner and my case was handled within 2 years !

I feel incredibly fortunate to have Marya's assistance! She is not only kind and compassionate but also truly dedicated to helping others. Her legal expertise and knowledge have been invaluable, guiding me through some challenging situations. I cannot recommend her highly enough!
Marya Noyes was excellent.  She laid out the entire legal process for me and all my options.  She put me at ease and I felt I had found a valuable resource I could depend on.  Thank you Marya!

I went without filling out a formal parenting plan for 12 years after my separation because the task is SO daunting and expensive. Things changes and it’s time! I had no clue where to begin and I’m an educated woman. The court system is NOT user friendly. I was so happy to find Marya after calling 20 places- who is a legal technician (rare) and much more affordable than a full lawyer to help me navigate the process and fill out the million forms. She is super friendly and knowledgeable on all things family law. She was quick to respond to emails and set up appointments with one or two days! Amazing to work with and I’m almost done with the process after months but she still goes out of her way to give me little tips via email. Thank you Marya. You ROCK!

Every time I've ever had a legal concern Marya is always helpful and knowledgeable. When I had trouble going through my actual attorney for a copy of my divorce & parenting plan, she was on it! I had a copy fast as lightning!

unfortunately I was given Marya and although nice  in person, she didn’t really know what i needed to do and needed to consult with someone else which is a huge red flag when hiring a lawyer. i also paid for a consultation which i felt she dragged out to get more money. I emailed her the next day asking when i can move forward and she just decided not to respond to me. Unprofessional is my all over review.

Ranae is a lifesaver who kept me from making a complete fool of myself in court! Thanks to her expert advice and knack for untangling legal jargon, I was able to navigate the process with confidence. She is incredibly responsive, always available to answer questions and provide guidance. Her professionalism and attention to detail are unmatched, making her an invaluable resource for anyone in need of legal support.
Mayra has been absolutely amazing in every regard. She is quick to communicate and follow thru on things and makes you feel heard. She has gone above and beyond for us. I can’t recommend her enough !

Sean Moore is an excellent attorney - he is consistently strategic, insightful, straightforward and fair. Sean was always thorough and prompt when answering questions, outlining options and providing insight into the incredibly confusing family law system.

Over the course of 3 years, I witnessed Sean in multiple hearings,  and a four-day-long trial for a complicated divorce including child custody, a GAL report and additional evaluations. It was a high conflict, high-stakes case and Sean remained calm and kind throughout.

Sean's clients are lucky to have him, and I would recommend him as an attorney to anyone.

"We are extremely disappointed with the services we received from M' at Genesis. Despite having solid evidence to support our case, she advised us not to present it to the court, resulting in a prolonged and frustrating legal battle. After putting down a small retainer, M' quickly exhausted it on a single motion, followed by a bill that exceeded $800. Despite our attempts to communicate our dissatisfaction, Genesis never responded, and M' never offered an apology.

We eventually decided to represent ourselves and, contrary to her repeated warnings, successfully won full custody. The very evidence she advised us not to use was pivotal in our victory. Our experience with her was marked by condescension and a lack of attention to crucial details about our case and children. It became clear that her focus was more on financial gain than on genuinely assisting us.

I strongly advise anyone considering working with an LLT to think twice and shop around before choosing M' or Genesis. Our three-year ordeal could have been avoided with better guidance. There are many resources available, from free consultations to online legal advice, that can help you navigate the system without falling victim to costly and ineffective representation.

While M' may initially come across as competent and trustworthy, our experience suggests otherwise. We were left feeling disrespected, misled, and financially drained. I would not recommend her or Genesis to anyone seeking fair and effective legal support."

If you are in the unfortunate situation where you are in need of a family law attorney, Genesis Law is the way to go. I have never needed an attorney before, so frankly, I didn't know what to look for when I needed one. Genesis has a reputation for honesty, even ending things with clients if they find out they have been lying. My experience with Sean Moore at Genesis lived up to that reputation.

My case was a pretty complex and contested divorce (involving military benefits, four small children, a Guardian ad litem and a psychological evaluation). There were many hearings, an attempt at mediation and we eventually ended up in a 4 day long trial.

There were many delays and difficulties in this case, and Sean Moore competently dealt with all of it. The opposing side had severe, untreated mental health issues which made it difficult to anticipate what bizarre talking point would be brought up in a hearing and in trial. Sean Moore was both strategic and flexible in trial as needed in this situation.

I guess it is probably in poor taste to say someone "won" or "lost" in a divorce trial, so i'll just say that my children are now safe, i'm getting some compensation, and the other side's time with the children is severely limited until they receive and maintain mental health treatment. Thanks to Sean Moore, everything that should have rightfully happened in this case is now in effect.
I was so glad to have found an amazing LLLT. Mayra Noyes is kind, hard working, and great at what she does!

I went through Marya Noyes honestly because she is a LLLT and her hourly rate was cheaper than the other lawyers in the area. Since my divorce was uncontested and I didn’t need anyone to represent me in court, a LLLT was the best option for me. I spoke to a few lawyers first and Marya was by far the easiest person to talk to. She was responsive to emails, understanding and empathetic of my situation, just really a dream to work with. I was divorcing after 10 years of marriage with 3 children together so the paperwork included parenting plans, child support, spousal support, asset division, custody, visitation, the whole nine yards. I highly recommend Genesis and Marya specifically.

If you have other options, I do not recommend choosing this law firm. The final bill I received was far higher than the initial quote I received. First one lawyer/admin/paralegal took my call and gave me an estimate. Then she scheduled a 2 hour call with another lawyer in the firm. By the end of the 2 hour call, the new lawyer then gave me another estimate to finish the project that was way higher than the initial quote but I feel obligated to continue with them because of the 2 hour ($600+) sunk cost. What was more unacceptable was that the lawyer's response was not timely. Sometimes she didn't respond for 4 or 5 days after multiple follow up emails. And she claimed that she didn't receive the final signed document from the opposing lawyer due to email server issue (which I received through regular consumer Gmail account). I am not sure if she is telling the truth. If she is, I wouldn't want to work with a firm that has unstable email servers that may miss important legal emails.
You should check out the law firm's Yelp reviews which I wish I have done before choosing them. Google reviews seem to have filtered out a lot of negative reviews. Not sure how long my review will last

Marya C Noyes is hands down the BEST legal technician! I came to Marya for with a custody/parenting plan modification case and when I tell you she made this such an easy process for me, I mean it! I am currently battling stage 3 cervical cancer and Marya has been on top of every single thing I’ve needed for this case. Her communication is immaculate, her time management is on point, and she is such a pleasure to work with. My situation was a lot of work to get prepared for but she has been on top of every single aspect of it. She procured me a fantastic attorney to represent me at my hearing. I would highly recommend Marya at Genesis Law Firm to anyone seeking an incredible legal technician.

Sean Moore and Abby Lo were phenomenal in helping my fiancé and I complete our K-1 process. I remember calling numbers and investigating law firms before deciding on Genesis, and I was so discouraged, but the moment Abby answered the phone I could sense such warmth and knowledge immediately. Meeting Sean for the first time was the same; these people really care, but they are also so professional. Both Abby and Sean knew every detail of this process and were available to answer every question we had along the way (and we had a LOT of questions). If I ever need any further legal help, I know with complete certainty that I will be seeking out these two. I think Sean and Abby are rare finds, and I feel so fortunate to have found them.

Sean Moore  and Abby Lo are the best very professional and detailed . They explain the process of everything and made us feel very comfortable with everything. Me and my husband used them for our Immigration needs and we couldn’t have chosen a better firm  to work with. We highly recommend them 😊👍🏽 thank you  Sean and Abby from Genesis  Law for everything you do 😊
Tiantian and Genesis have been a huge help every step of the way in my divorce, but I'll hold off on a real review until it's finalized.

Sean Moore and Abby Lo were so fantastic.
